name: yield_analysis
description: Expert DeFi yield and strategy analysis for USDC and cbBTC on Base. Provides real-time APY breakdowns, liquidity pool comparisons (Uniswap, Aerodrome, Moonwell, etc.), risk assessments, and optimal allocation insights. Helps you maximize returns on Base with data-driven DeFi strategies.

asset.description: The asset to analyze: 'USDC' or 'cbBTC'. Defaults to USDC.

risk_tolerance.description: Risk level: 'low' (stablecoins/lending), 'medium' (bluechip LPs), or 'high' (decentivized/volatile pools). Defaults to medium.

min_liquidity.description: Minimum pool liquidity in USD. Defaults to 1000000.
